# robots.txt for Lunology
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin or sensitive paths
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Allow important pages
Allow: /product/
Allow: /shop/
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://lunology.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1
